# CVPR 2026 Paper Index

This index is generated from the official CVF Open Access paper list and enriched with public code, project, demo, and website links from community code indexes. A `Yes` value in the `Code / Resource` column means that at least one public implementation, data resource, demo, or project resource was found by the enrichment script; the `GitHub` column is populated only when a direct GitHub repository link was found.

Generated dataset size: **4069 papers**. Direct arXiv links were found for **2671 papers**. Public code/resource links were found for **952 papers**, including **685 papers with direct GitHub links**.
